notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the thunderbird SRPM in CIQ LTS for Rocky Linux 8.6. It addresses 106 CVEs: CVE-2022-45403, CVE-2022-45404, CVE-2022-45405, CVE-2022-45406, CVE-2022-45408, and 101 more.
notes.title: Description

references.summary: Canonical URL for this CSAF document

document.title: thunderbird security update for CIQ LTS for Rocky Linux 8.6
